quotation.packageScope: One-page responsive hospital site only (institutes & services, gallery, FAQ, contact), basic SEO, Netlify hosting. Admin preview is a sample; production appointments system priced separately.
quotation.paymentTerms: 50% upfront to begin · 50% on delivery (not the full amount upfront)

outreach.notes: Public productinfo@stlukes.com.ph found. ASK before send. Website-only ₱15k; system sample separate.

system.label: OPD & appointments admin
system.painHero: Specialty clinics across Quezon City and Global City fill fast — see the OPD queue, consult rooms, and who's waiting before the next call stacks up.
